name: Hamburger Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a saucepan over medium heat until fully cooked.
2. Pour off excess grease from the pan using a slotted spoon or spatula.
3. Add the cubed potatoes to the pan, ensuring they are partially submerged in water.
4. Add enough water to cover the potatoes and meat by about an inch.
5. Place the onion whole into the pot so it can be easily lifted out when the potatoes are done cooking.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
